creation_context.raw_content_preview:
# Browser-use normalized trajectory: file-upload

Source file: `examples/custom-functions/file_upload.py`

## Original task excerpt

Go to https://www.w3schools.com/howto/howto_html_file_upload_button.asp and try to upload one of the available test files.

## Normalized trajectory

1. Open the required browser context.
2. Observe page state and task constraints.
3. Choose the next safe browser action.
4. Execute search/click/type/select/upload/extract as needed.
5. Re-observe and repair the plan
